title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-host and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, etc. with a single CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; use local models for chat, tools, RAG, agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; multi-user, RAG, plugins, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, streaming, POJO mapping, Spring starter.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with fuzzy model search, chat history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into inline GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image (CPU & GPU) with docker-compose examples for Linux, ROCm, CUDA.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs and query locally.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in threads; slash commands, role-based access.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for Ollama; declarative GPU drivers, model caching, systemd service.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Lightweight React chat app with Next.js, Tailwind, server-sent events.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama with DI-friendly interface, streaming, and MAUI demo.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes; templates, front-matter vars.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models in CI pipelines.
